name: Ransomware: Ryuk Potential Traffic
notes: This rule triggers when a TLS fingerprint known to be related to the Ryuk ransomware is observed. The rule is looking to match both client and server fingerprints to reduce the risk of false-positives.
conditions_text: when the flow matches "tls ja3 hash" IS NOT NULL AND "tls ja3s hash" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
when the flow matches "tls ja3 hash" IN ('57f3642b4e37e28f5cbe3020c9331b4c') AND "tls ja3s hash" IN ('e35df3e00ca4ef31d42b34bebaa2f86e') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Ransomware: Ryuk Potential Traffic on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the flow matches "tls ja3 hash" IS NOT NULL AND "tls ja3s hash" IS NOT NULL AQL filter query
AND when the flow matches "tls ja3 hash" IN ('57f3642b4e37e28f5cbe3020c9331b4c')  AND "tls ja3s hash" IN ('e35df3e00ca4ef31d42b34bebaa2f86e') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Ryuk Traffic observed
Event description: A potential Ryuk related JA3 Hash has been observed.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
